title: Here is why plea before Bombay High Court challenging Sir Ratan Tata Trust board composition was withdrawn
description: The petition challenging the composition of the board of Sir Ratan Tata Trust (SRTT) was withdrawn from the Bombay High Court on Wednesday. [Suresh Patilkhede v. State of Maharashtra & Ors].The petition, filed by Thane resident Suresh Patilkhede, had sought reconstitution of the SRTT board. It contended that the trust's present composition violated a 2025 amendment to the Maharashtra Public Trusts Act.
